'''âf-ch-sh''' ('''kafachash''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lubrify|lubrify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-ch-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lubrify|lubrify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âf-ch-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kafachash
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifachash|thifachash]] || [[word:jifachash|jifachash]] || [[word:shifachash|shifachash]] || [[word:kifachash|kifachash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufachash|thuthufachash]] || [[word:jujufachash|jujufachash]] || [[word:shushufachash|shushufachash]] || [[word:kukufachash|kukufachash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thufachash|thufachash]] || [[word:jufachash|jufachash]] || [[word:shufachash|shufachash]] || [[word:kufachash|kufachash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thufachash|thufachash]] || [[word:jufachash|jufachash]] || [[word:shufachash|shufachash]] || [[word:kufachash|kufachash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thefachash|thefachash]] || [[word:jefachash|jefachash]] || [[word:shefachash|shefachash]] || [[word:kefachash|kefachash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothofachash|thothofachash]] || [[word:jojofachash|jojofachash]] || [[word:shoshofachash|shoshofachash]] || [[word:kokofachash|kokofachash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofachash|thofachash]] || [[word:jofachash|jofachash]] || [[word:shofachash|shofachash]] || [[word:kofachash|kofachash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofachash|thofachash]] || [[word:jofachash|jofachash]] || [[word:shofachash|shofachash]] || [[word:kofachash|kofachash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠfachash|thĂŠfachash]] || [[word:jĂŠfachash|jĂŠfachash]] || [[word:shĂŠfachash|shĂŠfachash]] || [[word:kĂŠfachash|kĂŠfachash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathafachash|thathafachash]] || [[word:jajafachash|jajafachash]] || [[word:shashafachash|shashafachash]] || [[word:kakafachash|kakafachash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafachash|thafachash]] || [[word:jafachash|jafachash]] || [[word:shafachash|shafachash]] || [[word:kafachash|kafachash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafachash|thafachash]] || [[word:jafachash|jafachash]] || [[word:shafachash|shafachash]] || [[word:kafachash|kafachash]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shafachash|shafachash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshafachash|goshafachash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishafachash|gokishafachash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shafachashnĂŒ|shafachashnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshafachashnknĂŒ|goshafachashnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishafachashnĂŒ|gokishafachashnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafachashĂ«|shafachashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafachashnkshĂ«|goshafachashnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafachashĂ«|gokishafachashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafachashro|shafachashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafachashnkro|goshafachashnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafachashro|gokishafachashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shafachashmu|shafachashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafachashnkmu|goshafachashnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafachashmu|gokishafachashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shafachasher|shafachasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshafachashnksher|goshafachashnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishafachasher|gokishafachasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shafachashng|shafachashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshafachashnkng|goshafachashnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishafachashng|gokishafachashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shafachashya|shafachashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshafachashnkya|goshafachashnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishafachashya|gokishafachashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shafachashyam|shafachashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshafachashnkyam|goshafachashnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishafachashyam|gokishafachashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafachashnĂŒshĂ«|shafachashnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafachashnknĂŒshĂ«|goshafachashnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafachashnĂŒshĂ«|gokishafachashnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafachashnĂŒro|shafachashnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafachashnknĂŒro|goshafachashnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafachashnĂŒro|gokishafachashnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafachashnĂŒmu|shafachashnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafachashnknĂŒmu|goshafachashnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafachashnĂŒmu|gokishafachashnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafachashĂ«nĂŒ|shafachashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafachashnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshafachashnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafachashĂ«nĂŒ|gokishafachashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafachashĂ«ro|shafachashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafachashnkshĂ«ro|goshafachashnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafachashĂ«ro|gokishafachashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafachashĂ«mu|shafachashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafachashnkshĂ«mu|goshafachashnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafachashĂ«mu|gokishafachashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafachashronĂŒ|shafachashronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafachashnkronĂŒ|goshafachashnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafachashronĂŒ|gokishafachashronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafachashroshĂ«|shafachashroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafachashnkroshĂ«|goshafachashnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafachashroshĂ«|gokishafachashroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafachashromu|shafachashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafachashnkromu|goshafachashnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafachashromu|gokishafachashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafachashmunĂŒ|shafachashmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafachashnkmunĂŒ|goshafachashnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafachashmunĂŒ|gokishafachashmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafachashmushĂ«|shafachashmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafachashnkmushĂ«|goshafachashnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafachashmushĂ«|gokishafachashmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafachashmuro|shafachashmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafachashnkmuro|goshafachashnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafachashmuro|gokishafachashmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
